title: Senior Software Engineer - ISRO Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ISRO Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
ISRO Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
